name: Jen's Way Quick Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and drain off most of the fat. Add onions and garlic. Saute until translucent.
2. Add ground chiles (or chili powder if using), cumin, and oregano. Saute for a few more minutes.
3. Add diced tomatoes and Ro-tel tomatoes. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. After 15 minutes, add the beer. Continue to simmer for another 15 minutes or until desired consistency is reached.
